name: Elite Health Systems Inc.
summary: Elite Health Systems Inc. (formerly U.S. NeuroSurgical Holdings, Inc.) is a Delaware corporation developing a managed care organization to offer Medicare Advantage plans for seniors, initially targeting California counties of San Bernardino, Riverside, and Los Angeles, and Nevada's Clark County. The company has applied for a Knox-Keene license in California and formed Elite Health Plan of Nevada, Inc. It currently has no revenue and is pursuing regulatory approvals from California's DMHC and CMS.
